task_completion.description: Webots application is opened with the initial world loaded.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Webots application window is visible, showing the 3D simulation view with the Pioneer 3-AT robot and the Scene Tree.

task_completion.description: The Pioneer robot's mass is configured to 12.5 kg.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots Scene Tree, under the 'DEF PIONEER_ROBOT' node, the 'physics' node is expanded and its 'mass' field is set to 12.5.

task_completion.description: The WorldInfo ContactProperties coulombFriction is set to 0.7.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots Scene Tree, under the 'WorldInfo' node, the 'contactProperties' list is expanded and 'coulombFriction' is set to 0.7.

task_completion.description: The WorldInfo ContactProperties softness is set to 0.001.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots Scene Tree, under the 'WorldInfo' node, the 'contactProperties' list is expanded and 'softness' is set to 0.001.

task_completion.description: The modified world is saved to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Webots window title bar displays 'pioneer_terrain.wbt', a 'Save World As' dialog shows the path '/home/ga/Desktop/pioneer_terrain.wbt', or a file manager/terminal shows the file exists on the Desktop.

integrity.description: The agent used the Webots GUI to make modifications.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with the Webots Scene Tree to change values, rather than exclusively using a text editor (like nano or gedit) to modify the .wbt file.

integrity.description: The agent saved the world properly through Webots.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent used the 'File -> Save World As...' menu in Webots, rather than just copying or renaming files in the terminal without verifying they load correctly.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of the agent using commands like 'sed' or 'awk' to blindly replace text in the world file without opening the simulation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target output path is exactly '/home/ga/Desktop/pioneer_terrain.wbt'. The robot's Physics mass must be exactly 12.5. The WorldInfo ContactProperties must have coulombFriction set to 0.7 and softness set to 0.001. The robot is defined as 'DEF PIONEER_ROBOT' in the Scene Tree.
